name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve CodePage
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce

Steps to reproduce:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What did you expect to happen?

## Screenshots / Logs

If applicable, add screenshots or console logs. Open the Console Panel (bottom bar) and include relevant log entries.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 120, Firefox 121]
- Deployment: [e.g. Docker / local dev / cloud]
- Version: [check package.json or `git describe`]

## LLM Provider

- Provider: [e.g. DeepSeek, OpenAI, Ollama]
- Model: [e.g. deepseek-chat, gpt-4o, llama3.2]
- Auth type: [Bearer / None / x-api-key]

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.
